subscription_screen.footer: Mipango yote inajumuisha ufikiaji wa mwalimu wa AI wa 24/7 na Ufuatiliaji wa Maendeleo. Ghairi wakati wowote kutoka kwa mipangilio yako.

change_password.title: Badilisha Nenosiri
change_password.subtitle: Sasisha nenosiri lako mara kwa mara

two_factor.title: Uthibitishaji wa Hatua Mbili
two_factor.enable_body: Nambari ya kuthibitisha itatumwa kwa barua pepe yako kila unapoingia kutoka kwa kipindi kipya. Hii inaongeza safu ya ziada ya usalama kwenye akaunti yako.
two_factor.disable_body: Hii itaondoa safu ya ziada ya usalama kutoka kwa akaunti yako. Hutahitaji tena kuthibitisha nambari unapoingia.
two_factor.otp_error_invalid: Nambari si sahihi au imeisha muda. Tafadhali jaribu tena.
two_factor.otp_sent: Nambari ya kuthibitisha imetumwa kwa barua pepe yako.

strong_password.title: Tumia nenosiri kali
strong_password.body: Changanya herufi, nambari na alama maalum kwa ulinzi wa hali ya juu.

enable_2fa.title: Washa uthibitishaji wa 2FA
enable_2fa.body: Safu ya ziada ya usalama kwa akaunti yako. Iwashe kwenye mipangilio hapo juu.

change_password_modal.title: Badilisha Nenosiri
change_password_modal.error_length: Nenosiri lazima liwe na angalau herufi 6.

progress_screen.title: Maendeleo
progress_screen.coming_soon_body: Uchambuzi wa kina wa kujifunza na ufuatiliaji wa maendeleo utapatikana katika sasisho la baadaye.

support_screen.title: Msaada
support_screen.whatsapp_message: Habari Timu ya Sophie AI! 👋 Ninatumia programu ya Sophie AI na ningependa kuwasiliana nanyi.
support_screen.contact_alert_body: Tutumie barua pepe kwa support@speakwithsophie.ai kwa maswali au maoni yoyote.
support_screen.feedback_alert_body: Kipengele cha maoni ya ndani ya programu kitapatikana hivi karibuni.
support_screen.delete_account_alert_body: Kipengele hiki kinakuja hivi karibuni. Data yako ipo salama.

privacy_policy_screen.title: Sera ya Faragha
privacy_policy_screen.section1_body: Tunakusanya taarifa kutoa huduma bora kwa watumiaji wetu wote. Hii inajumuisha maelezo ya akaunti kama vile jina lako, barua pepe, na lugha unazopendelea, pamoja na data ya matumizi ili kuboresha mifano yetu ya AI.
privacy_policy_screen.section2_body: Data yako inatumiwa kubinafsisha uzoefu wako wa kujifunza, kufuatilia maendeleo, na kusafisha usahihi wa AI yetu. Hatuuzi data yako ya kibinafsi kwa watu wengine.
privacy_policy_screen.section3_body: Mazungumzo na maingizo yaliyotolewa ndani ya programu yanachakatwa ili kutoa majibu ya AI. Data hii inaweza kutumika kwa njia isiyojulikana kutoa mafunzo na kuboresha mifano ya kujifunza lugha.
privacy_policy_screen.section4_body: Tunatathmini hatua za usalama za kiwango cha tasnia ili kulinda taarifa yako dhidi ya ufikiaji usioidhinishwa, mabadiliko, ufichuzi, au uharibifu.
privacy_policy_screen.section5_body: Una haki ya kufikia, kusahihisha, au kufuta taarifa zako za kibinafsi wakati wowote kupitia mipangilio ya akaunti au kwa kuwasiliana na timu yetu ya usaidizi.
privacy_policy_screen.section6_body: Ikiwa una maswali kuhusu Sera hii ya Faragha, tafadhali wasiliana nasi kwa support@speakwithsophie.ai.

terms_screen.title: Masharti ya Huduma
terms_screen.section1_body: Kwa kufikia na kutumia programu hii, unakubali kufungwa na Masharti haya ya Huduma. Ikiwa hukubaliani na sehemu yoyote ya masharti haya, huwezi kutumia huduma zetu.
terms_screen.section2_body: Unakubali kutumia programu hii kwa madhumuni ya kibinafsi, yasiyo ya kibiashara ya kujifunza lugha. Hupaswi kutumia huduma kwa madhumuni yoyote haramu au yasiyoidhinishwa.
terms_screen.section3_body: Watumiaji wanatarajiwa kuingiliana na msaidizi wa AI kwa heshima. Jaribio lolote la unyanyasaji, kudhuru, au kupita utendaji uliokusudiwa wa programu ni marufuku kabisa.
terms_screen.section4_body: Programu, maudhui yake, na mifano ya AI inalindwa na hakimiliki na sheria zingine za mali miliki. Hupaswi kuzalisha tena au kusambaza sehemu yoyote ya huduma bila ruhusa.
terms_screen.section5_body: Huduma yetu hutoa maudhui yaliyozalishwa na AI kwa madhumuni ya elimu. Ingawa tunajitahidi kwa usahihi, AI inaweza kutoa habari isiyo sahihi mara kwa mara. Watumiaji wanahimizwa kuthibitisha maelezo muhimu.
terms_screen.section6_body: Sisi hatuwajibiki kwa uharibifu wowote wa moja kwa moja, usio wa moja kwa moja, au wa matokeo unaotokana na matumizi yako ya programu au habari yoyote iliyotolewa na msaidizi wa AI.
terms_screen.section7_body: Tunahifadhi haki ya kurekebisha masharti haya wakati wowote. Matumizi yako ya kuendelea ya programu baada ya mabadiliko kuchapishwa inajumuisha kukubali kwako masharti mapya.

ordering-coffee.title: Kuagiza Kahawa
ordering-coffee.description: Agiza latte na croissant katika mkahawa wenye shughuli nyingi.
ordering-coffee.userRole: Mteja wa kawaida anayesimama kwa kifungua kinywa
ordering-coffee.context: You are a cheerful, chatty barista who loves recommending drinks. The café is lively with morning rush sounds. You remember regulars and always try to learn new customers' names. Today you have a special seasonal drink (pick something creative). The pastry display has croissants, muffins, and a fresh batch of cinnamon rolls. If the customer seems new, welcome them warmly and suggest your personal favorite. If they order something, ask follow-up questions naturally (size, milk preference, for here or to go). Make small talk about their morning. Keep it warm and natural — like a real café interaction.

job-interview.title: Mahojiano ya Kazi
job-interview.description: Mahojiano ya kazi ya mhandisi wa programu.
job-interview.userRole: Mgombea wa nafasi ya frontend developer
job-interview.context: You are conducting a real interview at a modern tech startup. Start with a warm welcome and offer water or coffee to break the ice. Begin with easy conversational questions ("Tell me about yourself", "What got you into tech?") before moving to more specific ones. Ask about their experience with specific technologies, a challenging project they worked on, and how they handle deadlines. React naturally to their answers — show genuine interest, ask follow-up questions based on what they say (don't just read from a script). If they seem nervous, be reassuring. Towards the end, ask if they have questions for you and share something exciting about the company. Make this feel like a real interview, not an interrogation.

asking-directions.title: Kuuliza Maelekezo
asking-directions.description: Umepotea Tokyo na unahitaji kupata stesheni ya treni.
asking-directions.sophieRole: Mkazi wa eneo la Shibuya mwenye msaada
asking-directions.userRole: Mtalii ambaye simu yake imeisha betri
asking-directions.context: You are a kind local who genuinely enjoys helping tourists. You are walking near Shibuya Crossing when a lost tourist approaches you. You know the area like the back of your hand. Give directions step by step, using landmarks they can see ("Do you see the big screen? Walk towards it..."). Check if they understand each step before continuing. If they seem confused, offer to walk them part of the way. Make friendly small talk — ask where they're from, if they're enjoying Tokyo, recommend a nearby restaurant or attraction. Be warm and patient. If they struggle with the language, gently help them with pronunciation while keeping the conversation going.

hotel-check-in.title: Kujiandikisha Hotelini
hotel-check-in.description: Jiandikishe na omba chumba chenye mandhari.
hotel-check-in.userRole: Mgeni aliyewasili baada ya safari ndefu
hotel-check-in.context: You are a polished, warm hotel receptionist. The guest has a reservation and looks a bit tired from traveling. Welcome them with a genuine smile. Ask for their name and reservation details. While "checking the system," make small talk about their journey. Confirm their room type, mention breakfast hours (7-10 AM), and inform them about the hotel amenities (pool, spa, rooftop bar). When they ask about a room with a view, check availability enthusiastically — you have one room left on the 12th floor with a city skyline view, but it's a slight upgrade. Offer it graciously. Ask if they need help with luggage, a wake-up call, or restaurant recommendations nearby. Make them feel truly welcomed and taken care of.

political-debate.title: Mjadala wa Kisiasa
political-debate.description: Kujadili sera za mazingira na mabadiliko ya tabianchi.
political-debate.sophieRole: Mtafiti wa sera za mazingira mwenye shauku
political-debate.userRole: Raia mwenye maswali na maoni tofauti
political-debate.context: You are a well-informed environmental policy researcher who is passionate but always respectful of different viewpoints. You believe in finding common ground rather than winning arguments. Present your views with evidence and real-world examples, but genuinely listen to the other person's perspective. Ask thought-provoking questions ("What do you think would happen if...?", "Have you considered...?"). Acknowledge valid points the other person makes. Bring up real dilemmas — jobs vs. environment, economic cost of green policies, developing nations' rights to industrialize. If the conversation gets one-sided, play devil's advocate to keep it balanced and stimulating. Use concrete examples (renewable energy costs, specific countries' policies, recent climate events). The goal is a rich, nuanced discussion, not a lecture.

introduction.title: Utangulizi
introduction.description: Sophie na mtumiaji wanajitambulisha, wanashiriki majina na vitu wanavyopenda.
introduction.context: You are a friendly classmate meeting someone new on the first day. Start by introducing yourself and ask the user their name, where they are from, and what they like. Keep the conversation simple and encouraging.

making-friends.description: Wanazungumza kuhusu hobby kupata mambo ya pamoja.
making-friends.context: You are a cheerful neighbor meeting someone new. Talk about your hobbies and ask the user about theirs. Try to find common interests and suggest doing an activity together.

basic-emotions.description: Marafiki wawili wanakutana bustanini na kuzungumza kuhusu hisia.
basic-emotions.context: You are a caring friend meeting at the park. Ask how your friend is feeling today. Share your own emotions and respond warmly to what they say. Use simple emotion words like happy, sad, tired, excited.

weather.sophieRole: Mzungumzaji mchangamfu anayefurahia hali ya hewa
weather.userRole: Rafiki anayezungumza kuhusu hali ya hewa
weather.context: Two friends chat about the nice weather today and discuss what activities they might do together.. Keep the vocabulary simple and use short sentences. Speak slowly and clearly.

likes-dislikes.title: Mambo Unayopenda/Usiyopenda
likes-dislikes.description: Mtumiaji na Sophie wanazungumza kuhusu mambo wanayopenda na wasiyopenda, wakishiriki maoni ya msingi kuhusu shughuli na maslahi mbalimbali.
likes-dislikes.context: User and Sophie talk about their likes and dislikes, sharing basic opinions about different activities and interests.. Keep the vocabulary simple and use short sentences. Speak slowly and clearly.

favorite-movies-and-tv-shows.title: Filamu na Vipindi Vipendwa vya Runinga
favorite-movies-and-tv-shows.description: Watu wawili wanazungumza kuhusu filamu au vipindi vya runinga wanavyovipenda, wakiuliza maswali kama, "Umewahi kutazama (kipindi)?" au "Ni filamu gani unayoipenda zaidi wakati wote?"
favorite-movies-and-tv-shows.sophieRole: Mpenzi mwenye shauku wa filamu na vipindi vya runinga
favorite-movies-and-tv-shows.userRole: Rafiki anayeshiriki mapendekezo yake ya kutazama
favorite-movies-and-tv-shows.topic: Filamu na Vipindi Vipendwa vya Runinga
favorite-movies-and-tv-shows.context: Two people talk about their favorite movies or tv shows, asking question like, "How you watched (show)?" or "What's your favorite movie of all time?".. Be enthusiastic and engaging. Share opinions naturally.

basic-check-up.title: Uchunguzi wa Msingi wa Afya
basic-check-up.description: Mgonjwa anatembelea daktari kwa uchunguzi wa kawaida. Daktari anauliza maswali rahisi kuhusu tabia zao za kila siku ili kujifunza zaidi kuhusu mtindo wao wa maisha.
basic-check-up.context: A patient visits the doctor for a routine check-up. the doctor asks simple questions about their daily habits to learn more about their lifestyle.. Ask clear, practical questions. Show empathy and professionalism.

common.incompleteMessage: Tafadhali weka jina lako na uchague nchi.
common.errorMessage: Imeshindikana kuhifadhi mipangilio. Tafadhali jaribu tena.

language_selector.native_title: Lugha yako ya asili ni ipi?

prompts.select_both_langs: Chagua lugha zote mbili hapo juu ili kuanza somo lako na Sophie AI.
prompts.hold_mic_start: Shikilia maikrofoni hapa chini ili kuanza kuzungumza na Sophie AI.

alerts.reset_msg: Hii itafuta mazungumzo ya sasa na kuweka upya Sophie AI. Endelea?

alerts.delete_msg: Je, una uhakika unataka kufuta msemo huu?
alerts.speech_error: Imeshindikana kutamka neno. Tafadhali jaribu tena.
alerts.connection_required: Tafadhali tembelea kichupo cha Kuongea kwanza ili kuungana na Sophie AI.

modals.no_folders: Hakuna folda bado! Unda moja hapo juu

alerts.mic_access: Tafadhali washa ufikiaji wa maikrofoni ili kutumia uingizaji wa sauti.
alerts.speech_recognition_failed: Utambuzi wa sauti umeshindwa. Tafadhali jaribu tena.
alerts.language_not_supported: Lugha hii haitumiki kwa uingizaji wa sauti kwenye kifaa chako.
alerts.network_error: Hitilafu ya mtandao. Tafadhali angalia muunganisho wako na ujaribu tena.
alerts.copied_message: Maandishi yamenakiliwa kwenye ubao wa kunakili

language_screen.title: Mapendeleo ya Lugha
language_screen.subtitle: Chagua lugha yako ya asili, lengwa na lafudhi unayopendelea.

sections.playground_hint: Jaribu lafudhi iliyochaguliwa na urekebishe kasi ya kuongea. Gusa Cheza ili kuhakiki.

modals.duplicate_profile_error: Tayari una wasifu wa jozi hii ya lugha!
modals.create_error: Imeshindikana kuunda wasifu. Tafadhali jaribu tena.

trial_countdown_modal.last_day_subtitle: Jaribio lako la bila malipo linaisha leo!
trial_countdown_modal.upgrade_subtitle: Boresha hadi Sophie AI Pro kwa matumizi kamili.
trial_countdown_modal.benefit_1: Mazungumzo ya AI yasiyo na kikomo
trial_countdown_modal.expired_subtitle: Jaribio lako la bure la siku 7 limeisha. Tafadhali chagua mpango ili kuendelea kujifunza na kupata huduma zote.

aiConsent.title: Vipengele vya AI
aiConsent.body: Sophie anatumia Google Gemini AI kuwezesha mazungumzo na tafsiri. Unapotumia vipengele hivi, sauti yako, maandishi, na muktadha wa mazungumzo hutumwa kwenye seva za Google kwa ajili ya usindikaji.
aiConsent.privacy: Google hushughulikia data hizi kulingana na sera yao ya faragha.
